metadata.title: FlowDockr Guides
metadata.description: Scope creep playbooks for freelancers with direct policy-generation CTAs.

hero.title: Freelancer scope guides.
hero.description: Read one problem-focused guide, then generate your revision policy.

features.title: Choose your situation
features.description: Every guide follows: problem -> why it happens -> fix -> generate policy.

items.title: Client keeps asking for revisions
items.description: Set revision boundaries without sounding defensive.

items.title: Scope creep freelancer
items.description: Prevent scope expansion before it affects timeline and margin.

items.title: How many revisions should you offer
items.description: Choose revision limits that protect quality and speed.

items.title: Freelance revision policy
